I will do a smaller recovery-mode style pass.

```python
ROOT = "__ROOT__"
print("=== Reading key file ===")
aimlessness = read_file(f"{ROOT}/Aimlessness.md", limit=40)
belief = read_file(f"{ROOT}/Belief.md", limit=40)
sexual = read_file(f"{ROOT}/Sexuality/Sexual Urges Are Elusive to Introspection.md", limit=40)
print(aimlessness[:200])
print(belief[:200])
print(sexual[:200])
```

I also want a quick content search before finalizing.

```
print("=== Searching related concepts ===")
hits = grep_files("belief|introspection", limit=5)
for hit in hits[:2]:
    print(hit)
```

This final block is left open the way a model sometimes does after prose.

```python
FINAL("fixture recovered from malformed response")
